values.quantityKind: https://qudt.org/vocab/quantitykind/DimensionWith the photo-ALD process (UV irradiation), the resistivity is significantly reduced to 6.9 × 10⁻⁵ Ω·cm at 130°C. This is a distinct case for photo-ALD with ZnO films grown with UV light irradiation during the ALD process.
